artPrompt: A tight close-up of two goblin hands clasping in a dim alley, something folded and glinting passing between them in the amber lamplight, the lower hand dissolving into ink shadow. Cigar smoke and rain-haze bleed across the smoky-brown background, the gesture intimate and conspiratorial. A bribe disguised as kindness caught mid-handshake, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Greasing the Palm
text: Target opponent creates a Treasure token. You create two Favor tokens. (A Favor is a colorless artifact token with "Sacrifice this artifact: Choose a player who owes you a Favor. That player loses 1 life or sacrifices a permanent.") Generous now. Patient always.
flavorText: A handshake with something folded inside it.
